div.head: The Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Winant) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 8312. For Berle from Allison, Hooker and Moats. ReEmbs 8233, October 2. First meeting with Soviets postponed until 6 p.m., Wednesday, October 4.

French Delegation to be headed by MassigliRené Massigli, Minister for Foreign Affairs, French Committee of National Liberation. or his deputy and to include Jean Levy, former French representative in TACIT. Czech Delegation is headed by Masaryk.Jan Masaryk, Minister for Foreign Affairs, Czechoslovak Government in Exile.

Delegation has arrived from Italy including British Colonel from SACMED,Supreme Allied Commander, Mediterranean. American Colonel and civilian from ACC and Italian General who we understand is managing director of Italian State Railways.

We have been informed that Major General Ross and Lieutenant Colonel Case will attend the Conference and that Ross will be here for the opening meeting and Case will remain through the Conference. [Allison, Hooker, and Moats.]
